overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit coastal city at night. The character traverses a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees, descends into a lower concrete urban district with convenience stores, and enters a plaza with a large food advertisement mural before ascending stairs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet waterfront promenade past neon-lit food stalls and palm trees

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: row of palm trees lining the coastal road
wet asphalt road with moving vehicle traffic
food stall with bright cyan neon lighting and menu displays
illuminated advertisement screen showing a woman's face
tall building with large pink neon TENGU signage
tall pole with linear LED lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked waterfront promenade at night, with palm trees lining the coastal road to the left and a neon-lit food stall on the right. The wet concrete reflects the colorful neon lights from the TENGU building ahead and various street lamps, while sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower urban walkway with convenience stores

events.description: turns right from open waterfront into enclosed concrete passage with descending ramp

agents.ego_description: descending into a lower concrete urban area, passing convenience stores and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person with bright blue hair and yellow boots standing near a large digital billboard

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with weathered surface and graffiti
storefront with green PERIOD signage and red neon accents
large screen displaying make the world yours text with forest imagery
concrete ramp leading downward into the lower district

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a more enclosed urban area with high concrete walls and convenience stores. The PERIOD store with its green signage is visible on the right, while a large digital billboard dominates the left wall. The environment shifts from open waterfront to a sheltered concrete walkway with scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with mural and stairs

events.description: exits enclosed concrete passage into open plaza with trees and large mural
begins ascending wide concrete stairs at the far end of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past groups of people gathered near a colorful mural, then ascending stairs

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and sitting near the Big Eat Show mural

entered.detail: large colorful wall painting advertising The Big Eat Show with food imagery
mature trees with dense foliage planted in the concrete plaza
wide concrete staircase with illuminated edges leading upward
multi-story residential building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza featuring a prominent The Big Eat Show mural on the left wall, with people gathered around it. The character walks past plaza trees and groups of standing pedestrians before beginning to ascend a wide set of illuminated concrete stairs at the far end, with modern apartment buildings visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit waterfront promenade into a sheltered urban district that eventually opens into a bustling plaza. It begins along a rain-soaked coastal road where palm trees and a neon food stall flank the path, with the wet concrete reflecting the vibrant glow of the TENGU building. As the character moves forward, the environment shifts from the open coast into a more enclosed concrete walkway, passing under the green signage of a PERIOD store and a towering digital billboard. The scene then expands into a wide plaza featuring a prominent The Big Eat Show mural and groups of pedestrians gathered among city trees. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the plaza behind to ascend a wide set of illuminated concrete stairs toward modern apartment buildings in the background.
